item.title: This Recovery Plan Should Work
item.description: A heavy recovery operation built around a clear plan, the right equipment, and careful execution. The focus is on towing and vehicle rescue in a real-world field setting. What would you use first?

media:content.media:title: This Recovery Plan Should Work
media:content.media:description: A heavy recovery operation built around a clear plan, the right equipment, and careful execution. The focus is on towing and vehicle rescue in a real-world field setting. What would you use first?

item.title: Here We Tow Again
item.description: A straightforward towing and recovery operation focused on getting a vehicle moved safely with the right equipment and process. What would you like to see next?

media:content.media:title: Here We Tow Again
media:content.media:description: A straightforward towing and recovery operation focused on getting a vehicle moved safely with the right equipment and process. What would you like to see next?

item.title: This Should Work
item.description: A real-time recovery situation where a plan is put into motion to resolve a roadside issue. The video follows steps, coordination, and execution. What do you think is the hardest part of recovery work?

media:content.media:title: This Should Work
media:content.media:description: A real-time recovery situation where a plan is put into motion to resolve a roadside issue. The video follows steps, coordination, and execution. What do you think is the hardest part of recovery work?

item.title: Midnight in the Median
item.description: A nighttime recovery operation taking place in the highway median under low visibility conditions. The video highlights focus, lighting, and coordination. How different do you think night recoveries are compared to daytime work?

media:content.media:title: Midnight in the Median
media:content.media:description: A nighttime recovery operation taking place in the highway median under low visibility conditions. The video highlights focus, lighting, and coordination. How different do you think night recoveries are compared to daytime work?

item.title: Not Much to Be Honest
item.description: A simple roadside recovery job where the situation is handled efficiently with practical problem-solving. The video shows steady progress and teamwork. What makes some jobs go smoother than others?

media:content.media:title: Not Much to Be Honest
media:content.media:description: A simple roadside recovery job where the situation is handled efficiently with practical problem-solving. The video shows steady progress and teamwork. What makes some jobs go smoother than others?

item.title: Working Safely Near Power Lines
item.description: A roadside recovery situation taking place near power lines, highlighting safety awareness and careful operation. The video follows controlled work under challenging conditions. Why is safety planning so critical in recovery work?

media:content.media:title: Working Safely Near Power Lines
media:content.media:description: A roadside recovery situation taking place near power lines, highlighting safety awareness and careful operation. The video follows controlled work under challenging conditions. Why is safety planning so critical in recovery work?

item.title: Testing a New Recovery Setup
item.description: A look at a new vehicle or recovery setup being tested in real conditions. The video focuses on equipment handling and real-world performance. What matters most in a recovery setup like this?

media:content.media:title: Testing a New Recovery Setup
media:content.media:description: A look at a new vehicle or recovery setup being tested in real conditions. The video focuses on equipment handling and real-world performance. What matters most in a recovery setup like this?

item.title: A Beautiful View from the Roadside
item.description: A moment capturing a scenic roadside view during a recovery or work stop. The video blends calm visuals with real-world roadside operations. What’s the most unexpected place you’ve seen a view like this?

media:content.media:title: A Beautiful View from the Roadside
media:content.media:description: A moment capturing a scenic roadside view during a recovery or work stop. The video blends calm visuals with real-world roadside operations. What’s the most unexpected place you’ve seen a view like this?

item.title: Leaning Trailer Recovery
item.description: A leaning trailer presents a stability risk and requires careful correction to prevent tipping or further damage. What steps are needed to stabilize it safely?

media:content.media:title: Leaning Trailer Recovery
media:content.media:description: A leaning trailer presents a stability risk and requires careful correction to prevent tipping or further damage. What steps are needed to stabilize it safely?

item.title: Snow, Ice and Hot Tires
item.description: A combination of snow, ice, and heat creates unpredictable conditions during a recovery job. How do mixed conditions affect vehicle control?

media:content.media:title: Snow, Ice and Hot Tires
media:content.media:description: A combination of snow, ice, and heat creates unpredictable conditions during a recovery job. How do mixed conditions affect vehicle control?

item.title: Right Tires Were Stuck
item.description: A vehicle recovery focuses on freeing tires that are firmly stuck, using traction and winching techniques. What makes tire entrapment so difficult to fix?

media:content.media:title: Right Tires Were Stuck
media:content.media:description: A vehicle recovery focuses on freeing tires that are firmly stuck, using traction and winching techniques. What makes tire entrapment so difficult to fix?

item.title: Challenging Recovery Scene
item.description: An unexpected complication turns a standard recovery into a more complex operation requiring quick problem-solving. How do crews adapt on the spot?

media:content.media:title: Challenging Recovery Scene
media:content.media:description: An unexpected complication turns a standard recovery into a more complex operation requiring quick problem-solving. How do crews adapt on the spot?

item.title: Low Clearance Recovery Issue
item.description: A recovery challenge becomes more difficult as equipment nearly touches the ground, requiring precision handling. What risks come with low-clearance recoveries?

media:content.media:title: Low Clearance Recovery Issue
media:content.media:description: A recovery challenge becomes more difficult as equipment nearly touches the ground, requiring precision handling. What risks come with low-clearance recoveries?

item.title: Drag Winch for the Win
item.description: A drag winch setup proves essential in pulling a difficult recovery job to completion. Why are winch techniques so important in heavy recovery work?

media:content.media:title: Drag Winch for the Win
media:content.media:description: A drag winch setup proves essential in pulling a difficult recovery job to completion. Why are winch techniques so important in heavy recovery work?

item.title: Storm Damage Recovery
item.description: Severe weather leaves behind major damage, requiring careful recovery and cleanup of affected vehicles and equipment. How do crews respond after storms?

media:content.media:title: Storm Damage Recovery
media:content.media:description: Severe weather leaves behind major damage, requiring careful recovery and cleanup of affected vehicles and equipment. How do crews respond after storms?

item.title: Heavy Duty, No Days Off!
item.description: A nonstop schedule of heavy-duty recovery jobs shows the demanding pace of towing and rescue operations. What does a typical day in recovery work really look like?

media:content.media:title: Heavy Duty, No Days Off!
media:content.media:description: A nonstop schedule of heavy-duty recovery jobs shows the demanding pace of towing and rescue operations. What does a typical day in recovery work really look like?
